title: Quick Sort
hints: Implement the Quick Sort algorithm using divide and conquer approach.
Choose a pivot element (commonly first, last, or middle element).
Partition the array such that all elements less than pivot are on the left, and all elements greater than pivot are on the right.
Recursively sort the left and right subarrays.
The base case is when the subarray has 0 or 1 element (already sorted).
